description: Talk to your Oden AI todo and calendar account from Claude Code, Cursor, or any MCP client.
name: com.heyoden/mcp

environmentVariables.description: Oden API key (odn_live_*). Generate one in the Oden app at Settings → Developer → New key. Treat it like a password.
environmentVariables.name: ODEN_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the Oden API base URL. Defaults to https://api.heyoden.com/v1. Most users do not need to set this.
environmentVariables.name: ODEN_API_URL
